title: agentagencies/v2 frontmatter (AIP-21)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter portion of an AIP-21 AGENCY.md (workspace root or per-context view). The single doctype 'agency.workspace/v2' is used in both modes; the host distinguishes by checking whether `extends` is set. Per-doctype schemas (service, engagement, agreement, deliverable, invoice, counterparty, procedure, pricing-model, routine, capacity) are delegated to AIP-18 (COLLECTION.md / ITEM.md).

schema.description: Discriminator for the AIP-21 workspace doctype.

name.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for the agency or view.

description.description: One-paragraph statement of purpose: what this agency does and who it serves.

version.description: Semantic version of the WORKSPACE shape. Bump on collection / scope / lifecycle / lint / defaults changes. Independent of the agency's content version.

extends.description: OPTIONAL — relative path to a parent AGENCY.md. Presence makes the manifest a VIEW; absence makes it a WORKSPACE ROOT. Recursive composition; maximum chain depth is 8.

items.description: Either a ws:// ref to an AIP-9 operator / AIP-6 company / AIP-3 skill, or a relative path to a consumer workspace folder.

appliesTo.description: OPTIONAL — list of consumers this VIEW adapts the agency for. Hosts MUST refuse the view if any binding does not resolve. Not inherited; views declare their own scope.

legalEntity.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-6 ref to the company that legally signs agreements and issues invoices. When set, hosts SHOULD resolve this ref to populate legalName and taxId from the AIP-6 record.

legalName.description: OPTIONAL — display string for the legal entity name. Used when legalEntity is absent or to override the AIP-6 record's legalName.

taxId.description: OPTIONAL — tax identifier (VAT, EIN, GST, etc.). Hosts MUST treat this string as opaque; format validation belongs to per-jurisdiction tooling.

jurisdiction.description: OPTIONAL — primary jurisdiction the agency operates under, as ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (e.g. FR, US, GB, DE).

defaultCurrency.description: OPTIONAL — default currency for new invoices, as ISO 4217 (e.g. EUR, USD, GBP). Per-engagement overrides take precedence.

identity.description: Commercial-flavored identity block. All fields optional; agencies operating as a sole operator with no counterparty billing may omit the block entirely.

executor.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-9 default executor operator. The host activates this operator when an item with no explicit assignee surfaces.

governance.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-7 policy or audit binding. May be a path to an AIP-7 policy file or a ws:// ref. Status-transition approvals, signature gates on agreements, and audit log routing flow through this ref. Agreements MUST be signed; the default policy lives here.

knowledge.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-10 KNOWLEDGE.md ref. Wiki this agency refers to (case studies, prior-art, methodology).

work.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-20 work workspace binding. Items in `deliverable` MAY be tracked as work items in the bound workspace.

playbook.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-12 active playbook. Governs the routine plays this agency runs.

companies.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-6 companies root. Resolution root for `counterparty` items: a counterparty's companyRef resolves under this binding.

collections.description: Collections enabled by this agency. Three forms supported: inline (full COLLECTION.md frontmatter), file ref, or registry import. Merge-by-effective-name (alias if set, otherwise the collection's name) across the extends chain.

enabled.description: Whether cross-collection lifecycle propagation is active. When false, no lifecycle rules fire — items keep their stored statuses regardless of related items.

id.description: Stable kebab-case rule id. Merge key when composing across extends.

when.description: Predicate id from the recognised vocabulary. Custom predicates are host-defined keyed by `id`.

forCollection.description: Effective name of the collection whose items receive the bubbled status. MUST appear in the workspace's merged collections array.

bubbleStatus.description: Status id to set on the target item when the predicate holds. MUST exist on the forCollection's state machine.

params.description: Predicate parameters. Common keys: sourceCollection (collection whose items the predicate inspects), linkField (field on source items pointing at the target), terminalStatuses (subset of terminal statuses to count), statusEquals (specific status to match).

rules.description: Cross-collection lifecycle rules. Merge-by-id vs parent. Hosts MUST detect graph cycles in the (forCollection, sourceCollection) edge set and refuse with agency_lifecycle_cycle (HARD).

lifecycle.description: Engagement lifecycle helpers — workspace-level rules for cross-collection state propagation. The AIP-21 distinctive contribution.

enabled.description: Whether the containment axis is active. ONE-WAY SWITCH: once true at any ancestor, descendants MUST NOT set false (would orphan items). Refusal: agency_scope_disable (HARD).

field.description: Item field name carrying the containment ref.

allowedKinds.description: OPTIONAL — collection names allowed as containment parents.

enabled.description: Whether the applicability axis is active.

field.description: Item field name carrying the applicability ref list.

valueClass.description: Class of refs the field accepts. Recognised classes: client, market, service, company, role, role-and-company, operator. ONE-WAY SWITCH: once set at any ancestor, descendants MUST NOT change. Refusal: agency_scope_value_class_drift (HARD).

applicability.description: Applicability axis (who the item is about / scoped to).

enabled.description: Whether the ownership axis is active.

field.description: Workspace-level default item field name carrying the ownership ref.

policy.description: Workspace-level ownership policy. 'strict' requires every collection's ownership.required to be true; 'inherit' delegates; 'open' permits any collection to omit ownership.

ownership.description: Ownership axis (who is doing the item).

scope.description: Workspace-level scope axes — three orthogonal axes (containment / applicability / ownership) declared once per agency.

id.description: Stable kebab-case lint id. Merge key when composing with extends parent.

kind.description: Workspace-spanning lint algorithm. AIP-18 per-collection lints (missing-owner, overdue, required-field, etc.) live on COLLECTION.md and are NOT redeclared here. 'custom' delegates to a host-defined check identified by `id`.

severity.description: Lint severity. Children may soften; governance policies MAY forbid softening below `error`.

workflow.description: OPTIONAL — default AIP-15 WORKFLOW.md path or ref.

approvalClass.description: Approval class for mutations. 'auto' = no gate; 'always' = every mutation requires approval; 'on-mutate' = approval on field-level mutations; 'policy:<ref>' = delegate to an AIP-7 policy.

auditMutations.description: Whether mutations are audited. ONE-WAY SWITCH: once true at any ancestor, descendants MUST NOT set false. Refusal: agency_audit_downgrade (HARD).

defaults.description: Routine workflow defaults. Composes with AIP-15.

contractRequired.description: Whether engagement items require a corresponding agreement item. ONE-WAY SWITCH: once true at any ancestor, descendants MUST NOT set false (commercial protection against engagements without paperwork). Refusal: agency_contract_required_downgrade (HARD).

defaultPaymentTerms.description: OPTIONAL — default payment terms for new invoices. Common values: net-15, net-30, net-60, due-on-receipt, prepaid. Custom kebab-case strings permitted.

defaultCurrency.description: OPTIONAL — default currency for engagement-derived invoices, as ISO 4217. Falls back to identity.defaultCurrency if unset.

terms.description: Default commercial terms applied to new engagement and invoice items.

homePage.description: OPTIONAL — id of the item to use as the agency landing page.

display.description: Display hints for UIs that render the agency. Runtime-agnostic.

metadata.description: Vendor-specific extensions, namespaced under <vendor>. Deep-merged across the extends chain. MUST NOT change the meaning of any spec field.

allOf.description: A view (any manifest with appliesTo set) MUST extend a parent. A workspace-root manifest has neither field.

collectionEntry.description: One collection declaration. Either an inline AIP-18 collection schema, or a ref (path or ws:// URI) optionally aliased and version-pinned.

inline.description: Full AIP-18 collection.schema/v1 frontmatter, parsed in-place. The host registers the collection directly via AIP-18's defineCollection without loading a separate file.

collectionInline.description: Inline collection declaration. Full AIP-18 schema embedded; hosts MUST validate it against the AIP-18 COLLECTION schema before registration.

ref.description: Either a relative path to a COLLECTION.md (file ref) or a ws://collections/<slug> URI (registry import).

alias.description: OPTIONAL — workspace-local name to expose the collection under. Items in this workspace reference the alias, not the upstream name. Two collections resolving to the same effective name is a HARD failure: agency_collection_alias_conflict.

version.description: OPTIONAL — semver range (e.g. "1.x", "^1.2", "1.2.0"). When set, schema bumps outside the range fail with collection_item_schema_pinned_drift (HARD) at item load time.

collectionRef.description: Collection ref declaration. Either a file path or a registry URI.
